code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{Outlet,useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import Sidebar from"./Sidebar";import Topbar from"./Topbar";import{clearSession,getUser}from"../api/storage";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AppShell=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const[user,setUser]=useState(getUser());useEffect(()=>{const syncUser=()=>setUser(getUser());window.addEventListener("smartspend:user",syncUser);return()=>window.removeEventListener("smartspend:user",syncUser);},[]);const handleSignOut=()=>{clearSession();navigate("/login");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app-shell",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Sidebar,{user:user,onSignOut:handleSignOut}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app-shell__main",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Topbar,{user:user,onSignOut:handleSignOut}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"app-shell__content",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Outlet,{})})]})]});};export default AppShell;
